signals.headline: TRUMP HALTS IRAN STRIKES BEFORE 'OBLITERATION' DEADLINE, SECURES TWO-WEEK CEASEFIRE WITH IRAN AND ISRAEL ON BOARD | YES
signals.raw:
TRUMP HALTS IRAN STRIKES BEFORE 'OBLITERATION' DEADLINE, SECURES TWO-WEEK CEASEFIRE WITH IRAN AND ISRAEL ON BOARD | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

U.S. President Donald Trump paused military strikes on Iran just prior to a threatened “obliteration” deadline, agreeing to a two-week ceasefire that includes Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz and both sides advancing a 10-point negotiation proposal.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.raw: Context:** These April 15 updates signal strong institutional demand and improved on-chain liquidity, directly pressuring ETH prices upward amid recent surges vs. Bitcoin.[3][4] No confirmations or resolutions reported today (April 16) qualify as "right now" breaking news.[1][2][6] Prediction markets could shift on ETF momentum (Fidelity FETH led inflows) and compliant stablecoin adoption, though

signals.headline: Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Shin Hyun-song, the incoming Bank of Korea chief, stated on April 14, 2026, that headline consumer inflation is likely to accelerate, amid his confirmation hearing.[1][5] This recent warning links directly to South Korea's monetary policy outlook and could influence prediction markets on BoK
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Eyed for April 16 as Deadline Nears; No Extension Confirmed | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Eyed for April 16 as Deadline Nears; No Extension Confirmed | NO | MED confidence**  
A new round of US-Iran talks on ending the war could occur today (April 16), per AP citing unnamed US officials, amid an expiring two-week ceasefire and ongoing US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.[5][7]
